title: Crazy Overpowered Ideas - COPI
description: A mod that adds random and mostly unrelated cool stuff.
body:
# About

**Feedback would be much appreciated.**

**Send feedback at my discord:
https://discord.gg/gtm52hEcht**

**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB AND REI.**

**NO PART OF THIS WORK MAY BE COPIED, MODIFIED, DISTRIBUTED, OR PUBLISHED IN ANY FORM** **WITHOUT PRIOR WRITTEN PERMISSION FROM THE COPYRIGHT HOLDER.**

**THIS MOD MAY ONLY BE USED IN MODPACKS, PROVIDED PROPER CREDIT IS GIVEN AND NO** **MODIFICATIONS ARE MADE TO THE SOURCE FILES.**

COPI is short for Crazy Overpowered Ideas. The mod is a collection of random and mostly unrelated stuff, mostly in the form of desctuctive and unique gadgets.

## Features

**All mod recipes can be viewed via REI.**

### Golron Alloy

- Crafted by combining an iron and gold ingot. Crafting ingredient for Golrondia Alloy.

![Golron Alloy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12fb59a8387820548543aa89a60bbe75ccc2c543.png) 

### Golrondia Alloy

- Crafted by combining Golron Alloy and a diamond. Crafting ingredient for Golrondiarite Alloy.

![Golrondia Alloy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b7facb7450b944852dc2868d305603069e48b5.png) 

### Golrondiarite Alloy

- Crafted by combining Golrondia Alloy and a netherite ingot. Crafting ingredient for PumoPumo Metal.

![Golrondiarite Alloy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f04cc1f225334dc082b7b09b5974527cf8d8b472.png)

### PumoPumo Metal

- Crafted by combining 2 Golrondiarite. Crafting ingredient for most stuff in the mod.

![PumoPumo Metal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceee931589a9f944d2e7fa80c1c31a167035e090.png)

### PumoPumo Metal Block

- **Unbreakable**

- **Perfect for a bunker.**

- Used to craft Breakorax and Atombots parts.

- Crafted using 9 PumoPumo Metal.

- Can be crafted into 9 PumoPumo Metal.

![PumoPumo Metal Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31cc1cecbed471d531dd4a8f5fd35896a14a0088_0.webp)

### Breakorax

- Crafting ingredient for Breakorax Vial.

![Breakorax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aa90544fe94c28b843c25a50770693c7e5149b2_0.webp)

### Breakorax Vial

- Crafting ingredient for Scarabarmour Chestplate and Breakorax Gloves.

![Breakorax Vial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21a9c4f7e11f16f089b4c0ea3a1552643ebea11d_0.webp)

### Scarabarmour Helmet

- Overlays screen with a yellow tinted HUD with useful statistics.

- Statistics:

  Height, Speed, Current dimension and biome, Coordinates, Held item durability, Automatic Bow mode and Breakorax mode.

- Shows amount and direction of hostile mobs in a 5 block radius on HUD.

- Rightclick while holding to turn Breakorax mode on and off.

![Scarabarmour helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b134fbbb9afd2981c527f1d409f37ec3a7d299.png)

### Scarabarmour Chestplate, Leggings and Boots

- Armour piece models have 3d models when worn.

- Set Bonus: Night Vision, Invincibility, Enemy Highlighting and Breakorax Nanobots Injection on entity hit.

![Scarabarmour chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a9189b964eb75df868195bd06b7facec6502f14.png)

![Scarabarmour leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebfcb387108dea7bccd29c5dc6896f33d2185607_0.webp)

![Scarabarmour boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c059e70c6c79c7b8c1c54d16bbb5fb89b7f30f_0.webp)

### Breakorax Gloves

- Disassembles hit entity at cellular level, leaving only dust.

![Breakorax Gloves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dca107a676cfe5f047e31a1c78f5161d780729a6_0.webp)

### Auto Bow

- Press R while holding to open a radial menu used for choosing arrow mode.

- Modes:
  
  Normal, Fire, Freeze, Lightning, Explosive, Remote, Lava, Smoke, Flashbang, Teargas, Taser, Pulse, Punch, Grappling Hook, Instant Damage, Poison, Wither, Instant Health, Regen and Tranq.

- Turn arrow homing on and off with bow radial menu.

- Rightclick arrows with bow in inventory to reload.

- When arrows are shot into blocks while remote explode mode is on, choose Detonate in bow radial menu to explode arrows.
 
![Automatic Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/392bc07ea40247492e83d5eaad27ff7e0bc61bcb_0.webp)

### Empty PCB

- Crafting ingredient for Printed PCB.

![Empty PCB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d4e02d003ebc193d30352c3394e71059c40683_0.webp)

### Printed PCB

- Crafting ingredient for Brain Chip Computer.

![Printed PCB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c489ccbcbfc355bb275da989f33c2b219181539_0.webp)

### Brain Chip Processor

- Crafting ingredient for Brain Chip Computer.

![Brain Chip Processor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65058015627bd1a5343291d2e6698ff82eae7f6_0.webp)

### Brain Chip Computer

- Crafting ingredient for Brain Chip.

![Brain Chip Computer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d00f38dc86ea3b5b19083a58c67870f2a0d0711_0.webp)

### Wire

- Crafting ingredient for Brain Chip.

![Wire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef648cb3c55071da7811c887df23936948eacdf7_0.webp)

### Brain Chip

- Rightclick to implant Brain Chip into your brain.

- Brain Chip gives special abilities.

- Abilities is accessed via radial menu page 1, titled Brain Chip.

- Open radial menu with R key.

- **Abilities:**
  - **Detonate:**
    - Gives Detonate effect.
    - When leftclicking while having Detonate effect, all NeuraNukes existing in the world detonates.

  - **Hack:**
    - Gives 64 emeralds. Gives a 10 min cooldown effect during which abiltity can't be used.

  - **Internet:**
    - Gives Internet effect.
    - While having internet effect, screen is overlayed with heading, weather, temperature, time, spawn location, blocks between spawn location and current location and heading between spawn location and current location. **SL is short for Spawn Location. B is short for Blocks. H is short for Heading. CL is short for Current Location.**

  - **Shop:**
    - Opens a sub radial menu containing options with item names. Click on item names to get 1 item in return for 1 emerald, except for Iron Armour which costs 4 emeralds. Available items: Apple, Iron Sword, Iron Pickaxe, Iron Axe, Iron Shovel, Iron Hoe, Bone, Torch, Seed, Bow, Bucket, Arrow, Planks and Iron Armour.

  - **Teleport Gear:**
    - Teleports weapons and armour from the mod, in a 128 block radius, to you.

  - **Invisible Gear:**
    - Makes held weapon and worn armour invisible.

- **Required to use Atombots Vial, UCSS and NeuraNuke.**

![Brain Chip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a929acefeef31c1b2d2b70d5a3308ee52282adee_0.webp)

### Atombots Converter

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots.

![Atombots Converter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c12d402ffbd10d3f5a8eb7884132dc0cf64f8c2_0.webp)

### Scanner

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots.

![Atombots Scanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/619c2f6c99e8c4633105191299f1ebec99c6ff1e_0.webp)

### Antenna

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots Antenna Unit.

![Antenna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cc7c826d500812a9dc5fb02854d23be9944f4bd_0.webp)

### Atombots Antenna Unit

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots.

![Atombots Antenna Unit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28cae0a6f9c4b5c9978bb7c0a3abcde90322128b_0.webp)

### Atombots Claw

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots.

![Atombots Claw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15cf7ca2ca0fe5613766b3012573cff63befdff6_0.webp)

### Atombots

- Crafting ingredient for Atombots Vial.

![Atombots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c25de5ad72e9a1383ec83aaf71ff0405979353.png)

### Atombots Vial

- **Requires Brain Chip to use.**

- Rightclick to bind Atombots to your atoms.

- Allows access to METOS.

- METOS abilties is accessed via radial menu page 2, titled METOS.

- Open radial menu with R key.

- **Abilities:**
  - **Convert:**
    - Converts you into energy.
    - While Converted you are effected with Converted effect.
    - While having Converted effect, you are invisible, intangible, invulnerable, hunger resistant and you heal completely when activating Convert and you can fly. Entities in a 100 block radius are highlighted. Shows amount and direction of incoming hostile mobs in a 5 block radius on HUD.

  - **Energize:**
    - Gives Energize effect. Requires having Atombots effect.
    - Leftclick while having Energize effect to convert looked at entity into energy.

  - **Burnout:**
    - Gives Burnout effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Leftclick while having Burnout effect to set looked at entity on fire.

  - **Freeze:**
    - Gives Freeze effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Leftclick while having Freeze effect to immobilise looked at entity.

  - **Blind:**
    - Gives Blind effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Leftclick while having Blind effect to blind looked at entity.

  - **Move:**
    - Gives Move effect. Requires being Converted.
    - While having Move effect, move looked at entity with your look direction.

  - **Teleport:**
    - Gives Teleport effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Rightclick while having Teleport effect to move 100 blocks in your look direction.

  - **Fast Fly:**
    - Gives Fast Fly effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Fly fast.

  - **Super Fast Fly:**
    - Gives Super Fast Fly effect. Requires being Converted.
    - Fly super fast.

- METOS is short for Matter To Energy Teleportation and Omnipresence System.

![Atombots Vial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d41f0af8d189308dd715932fd0836426bc516f9f_0.webp)

### UCSS

- Short for Universal Control and Surveillance System.

- **Requires Brain Chip to use.**

- Rightclick to activate UCCS.

- Allows access to UCCS which allows accessing some METOS abilities.

- **Abilities:**
  - **Burnout**
  - **Freeze**
  - **Blind**
  - **Move**
  - **Entities in a 100 block radius are highlighted.**
  - **Shows amount and direction of incoming hostile mobs in a 5 block radius on HUD.**

![UCSS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3a1aa03b43dc7c23fcc90302aa6128fecf2baa_0.webp)

### NeuraNuke

- **Requires Brain Chip to use.**

- Arm via Detonate effect via radial menu page 1, titled Brain Chip.

- Detonate with leftclick while Detonate effect is active.

![NeuraNuke](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd8a53700ab501d91a221c8c24243b9d572c83b3.png)

### Exotic Matter

- Used to open a portal to a pocket dimension.

![Exotic Matter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0019c29cfc7e95f5a6aa1825d6cc1e96818c63b2.png)

### Pocket Dimension

- Build a portal to a pocket dimension by building a portal frame with PumoPumo Metal Blocks in the same shape as a nether portal frame.

- Rightclick Exotic Matter on PumoPumo Metal Block portal frame to open portal to pocket dimension.

- Pocket dimension is empty with an endless day.

- Use /setblock blocktype ~ ~ ~ to create a block at your feet from where you can build your pocket dimension or use Worledit mod to build your pocket dimension.

![Pocket Dimension Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d3e716b5ad3da969496ab92ada7b551d8c4ade_0.webp)

![Pocket Dimension Interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76813f161a2f5bbc78b072523062ca2c729a2c2c.png)

### Sucker

- Rightclick to deploy Sucker entity that sucks up mobs and blocks from under and the sides.

- Press R while holding to open a radial menu used for choosing Sucker depth mode.

- Modes:

  - 16: Sucks until reaching Y level -16.

  - 32: Sucks until reaching Y level -32.

  - 64: Sucks until reaching Y level -64.

- Press R while holding to open a radial menu used for choosing Sucker behaviour mode.

- Modes:

  - Spit: Sucks in mobs and blocks and spits mobs and blocks out towards player.

  - Destroy: Sucks in mobs and blocks and doesn't spit mobs and blocks out.

  - Keep: Sucks in mobs and blocks, drops itself and spits mobs and blocks out on next use while in Keep mode.

![Sucker in Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/158287791e8e92cb6ef5b1f7981e2a4bac3c50f8.png)

![Sucker in Action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0acd472c9c400ac58524549583e038504e69e10.png)

### Arabica Coffee

- **Arabica Coffee Cherries**

  - Has a 25% chance to drop from Acacia Leaves when broken.
  
  - Cook in a furnace to get Arabica Coffee Beans.

![Arabica Coffee Cherries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6634423233c33bd9968c46de35f780f98b66f9ed.png)

- **Arabica Coffee Beans**

  - Cook in a furnace to get Roasted Arabica Coffee Beans.

![Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03b4225c00cf2c10bf3158db2fd5ec3f67f0aa2b.png)

- **Roasted Arabica Coffee Beans**

  - Put in a crafting table to get Ground Arabica Coffee Beans.

![Roasted Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1caba80d946f2b1523ac875c3a952db1ef90986.png)

- **Ground Arabica Coffee Beans**

  - Used to make Arabica Espresso, Cortado and Flat White.

![Ground Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78f05679bdb46b540bea26bd31eda3d902fb370.png)

- **Arabica Espresso**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 3 and Poison 1 when it runs out.

![Arabica Espresso](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08c4476abd4239138a9a085b9b88489b4410d72a.png)

- **Arabica Cortado**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 2.

![Arabica Cortado](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3037a9a43e64694946cfa6b8a7706898b07f005d.png)

- **Arabica Flat White**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 1.

![Arabica Flat White](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487314e93c64a873936ad5d4b093113038e0bd26.png)

### Robusta Coffee

 - **Robusta Coffee Cherries**

   - Has a 25% chance to drop from Acacia Leaves when broken.
  
   - Cook in a furnace to get Robusta Coffee Beans.

![Arabica Coffee Cherries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6634423233c33bd9968c46de35f780f98b66f9ed.png)

- **Robusta Coffee Beans**

  - Cook in a furnace to get Roasted Robusta Coffee Beans.

![Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03b4225c00cf2c10bf3158db2fd5ec3f67f0aa2b.png)

- **Roasted Robusta Coffee Beans**

  - Put in a crafting table to get Ground Robusta Coffee Beans.

![Roasted Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1caba80d946f2b1523ac875c3a952db1ef90986.png)

- **Ground Robusta Coffee Beans**

  - Used to make Robusta Espresso, Cortado and Flat White.

![Ground Arabica Coffee Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78f05679bdb46b540bea26bd31eda3d902fb370.png)

- **Robusta Espresso**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 3 and Poison and Nausea 1 when it runs out.

![Arabica Espresso](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08c4476abd4239138a9a085b9b88489b4410d72a.png)

- **Robusta Cortado**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 2 and Nausea 1 when it runs out.

![Arabica Cortado](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3037a9a43e64694946cfa6b8a7706898b07f005d.png)

- **Robusta Flat White**

  - Gives Speed and Haste 1 and Nausea 1 when it runs out.

![Arabica Flat White](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487314e93c64a873936ad5d4b093113038e0bd26.png)

### Battery

![Battery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1faf41b341887a7adc07fea1aac868cc9bafafd9_0.webp)

Used to craft and repair NVG Helmet.

### NVG Helmet

![NVG Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4dbcfe70bc545ac0a7bed934897db9061b745c3_0.webp)

- Short for Night Vision Goggles Helmet.
  
- Gives night vision when worn in helmet slot.

- Repaired by holding helmet in one hand and battery in the other and rightclicking the one in the mainhand slot.

### Oxygen Tank

- Used to craft Scuba Set Top and repair Scuba Set.

![Oxygen Tank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bfc7599f7fdd18bfdfd181ce28e2d25840527a4_0.webp)

### Scuba Set

- **Scuba Set Cap**

![Scuba Set Cap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cb243f451bbc4fb9d0597ba9bf26f07dfed6500_0.webp)

- **Scuba Set Top**

![Scuba Set Top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be20bed6d3b2c4da17e62f015c9f7763bc645ecf_0.webp)

- **Scuba Set Pants**

![Scuba Set Pants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6226ecf4a05d567d57e4d9e277e32cb160f96aa3_0.webp)

- **Scuba Set Flippers**

![Scuba Set Flippers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e047ab9ad6e5bfc7bf8af906b2873c64d24d2f_0.webp)

- Gives water breathing when underwater and entire set is worn.

- Repaired by holding scuba set piece in one hand and oxygen tank in the other and rightclicking the one in the mainhand slot.

### Crafting Saddles

![Crafting Saddles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d63aaa5d63bc79d3a28f7e9b33246ce13bf45a3.png)

### Crafting Sticks into Oak Planks

![Crafting Sticks into Oak Planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef2814bbb8812f7c9086a2030c64213cae90d00.png)

### Crafting Wool into String

![Crafting Wool into String](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81178e2cc4d7166daf7997d672b993e44ca37410.png)

### Iron Sand

![Iron Sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6489f77cad577bcc62db3ff8eb5c1b60d70e8006.png)

### Iron Sand Charcoal Mix

Used to craft Iron Sand Charcoal Mix.

![Iron Sand Charcoal Mix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/627a84d8da5818e9a715d54ac3bac1ec34a4d705_0.webp)

Smelt in a furnace for 5 min to get Raw Tamahagane Steel.

### Raw Tamahagane Steel

![Raw Tamahagane Steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ee9fb807811be4974d809cb7e263e35e79f03c5.png)

Put in a crafting table to get Tamahagane Steel Ingot.

### Tamahagane Steel

![Tamahagane Steel Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/097383bda1817261d5f78fa382225d8ba88219f6_0.webp)

Used to craft Katana and Wakizashi Blade.

### Katana Blade

![Katana Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2772ad8b792e230843b17faeaf281953da30dc7_0.webp)

Used to craft Katana.

### Wakizashi Blade

![Wakizashi Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d614b6c203f68ab4b10c582f465a65174c1c9c6c_0.webp)

Used to craft Wakizashi.

### Japanese Sword Guard

![Japanese Sword Guard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51baba2fcc522ba073c3e260b05be24c034515c9_0.webp)

Used to craft Japanese Swords.

### Katana Hilt

![Katana Hilt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6e21523f760dbfbd8aec55c7840464167942d83_0.webp)

Used to craft Katana.

### Wakizashi Hilt

![Wakizashi Hilt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab59188c09bad7d110d9239d1f950f798e0d8735_0.webp)

Used to craft Wakizashi.

### Katana

![Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0ebaee420fd67f7a5367ae98db357ce9134a22.png)

Instantly kills most mobs.

Repaired by holding Katana in one hand and Sharpening Stone in the other and rightclicking.

### Wakizashi

![Wakizashi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33e4681da3b30745b3f120b0791514368c5eba36.png)

Slows and weakens mobs and kills most mobs with two hits.

Repaired by holding Wakizashi in one hand and Sharpening Stone in the other and rightclicking.

### Daisho

![Daisho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92e35fc55ddea135c7e408aafc46e404d37a6c56.png)
